original_primary_failure: subject/seed win-rate criteria failed and all original-pretrained-feature groups were near chance
first_broken_link: pretrained frozen ST features were not sufficiently class-separable for this few-shot protocol
updated_conclusion: source-tuned ST features repair the feature substrate, but locked SASCert_SoftAR remains unreliable across subjects/seeds and is slightly below SoftWeight_noReject on mean Macro-F1
next_experiment: method-local artifact-gate diagnosis under source-tuned ST; compare SoftWeight_noReject as the ST-specific branch before expanding to new datasets or backbones
